justifications.clarity: Clear prose throughout; financial examples ground abstract concepts; practical pointers added to sections 7, 10, 12 give explicit lab-lecture connections.
justifications.rigor: Chinchilla theorem stated precisely with proof sketch; LoRA worked example (8.4M = 0.12% of 7B) is arithmetically correct; Bradley-Terry, PPO, and DPO equations all present; BOOK-ONLY flags correctly scope full proofs.
justifications.completeness: All 12 topics covered including MinHash Jaccard definition, BPE fertility formula, full 3-tier governance framework, AliBi positional encoding, and Lopez-Lira Sharpe result.
justifications.pedagogy: 8 specific measurable LOs after splitting the original omnibus LO7; Section 8 trimmed to overview with BOOK-ONLY notes; practical pointers to three lab exercises; CLM/MLM/span-corruption decision framework added.
justifications.style: No bold paragraph labels or \paragraph{} in running prose; BOOK-ONLY flags appropriately placed; flowing narrative sections with no bullet dumps.
